meta.title: FLUX.2 Image Generator | Multi-Reference & Text Rendering | OpenCreator
meta.description: Explore FLUX.2 from Black Forest Labs for multi-reference consistency, reliable typography, and production-ready image editing. Available now on OpenCreator.

hero.tagline: Frontier visual intelligence for production workflows
hero.description: FLUX.2 from Black Forest Labs delivers high-fidelity generation and editing with strong multi-reference consistency, improved text rendering, and native image editing capabilities for production workflows on OpenCreator.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Built for brand, product, and design workflows

multiRef.title: Multi-reference consistency
multiRef.description: Keep subject, product, and style consistent across variations with multiple references.

text.title: Reliable text rendering
text.description: Better typography for posters, packaging, UI mockups, and infographics.

detail.title: Sharper details & realism
detail.description: More stable lighting, textures, and photoreal details for production use.

editing.title: Text + reference editing
editing.description: Combine text instructions and references to edit images with fewer manual steps.

prompt.title: Improved prompt following
prompt.description: Better adherence to structured prompts and compositional constraints.

workflow.title: Production-ready workflows
workflow.description: Designed to reduce iteration cost and increase usable outputs.

pricing.note: Credits consumed per generation vary by image size and quality settings. Final cost is shown before you run.

0.question: What is FLUX.2 and what are the available tiers?
0.answer: FLUX.2 is the latest image generation model from Black Forest Labs. It's available in three tiers: Pro (maximum quality), Turbo (enhanced speed with crisper text), and Dev (fast prototyping with LoRA support).

1.question: What is multi-reference useful for?
1.answer: Multi-reference helps keep characters, products, and style consistent across multiple generations - essential for brand consistency and product photography.

2.question: How does FLUX.2 handle typography?
2.answer: FLUX.2 features significantly improved text rendering compared to FLUX.1, making it suitable for posters, packaging, UI mockups, and any content requiring legible text.

3.question: Does FLUX.2 support image editing?
3.answer: Yes, FLUX.2 includes native image editing capabilities with natural language descriptions and hex color control for precise modifications.

4.question: What resolution does FLUX.2 support?
4.answer: FLUX.2 supports up to 4MP resolution output with multiple aspect ratio options including square, portrait, and landscape formats.
